examples: The extent of the damage could not have been foreseen.
I hadn't foreseen the tempest my request would cause.
No one could have foreseen (that) things would turn out this way.
However, he said that the chances of this particular prank being foreseen were "very low indeed".
The second is foreseen to be held in Kenya (Africa region) on 24-26 May 2012.
